name: TARGETPAIRS_BY_TARGET_FUNCTION
description: Target pairs by target functional category. Auto-generated from the core-four benchmark and aligned to the validated query-frame Cypher semantics.
cypher:
MATCH (t0:Target {symbol: $target})-[:FUNCTIONED_AS]->(f:Functional_of_Target)<-[:FUNCTIONED_AS]-(t:Target)<-[:HAS_TARGET]-(tp:TargetPair)
RETURN DISTINCT tp.name AS target_pair, f.name AS functional_category
ORDER BY target_pair
LIMIT 50

examples: Which target-pair combinations fall under the functional category associated with ITGB1?
Which target-pair combinations contain targets in the same functional category as HLA-A?
Which target-pair combinations fall under the functional category associated with IL2RB?
